Title: Relates to permitting members of the coordinating council for services related to Alzheimer's disease and other dementia to participate in meetings through the use of videoconferencing
Summary: Permits members of the coordinating council for services related to Alzheimer's disease and other dementia to participate in meetings through the use of videoconferencing.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to permitting members of the coordinating council for services related to Alzheimer's disease and other dementia to participate in meetings through the use of videoconferencing
